steps.title: Use the range clue
steps.content: The work covers contemporary issues and also provides context reaching back to the sixteenth century. That time span shows breadth in what the scholarship covers.

steps.title: Reject unrelated traits
steps.content: B would require evidence of fairness, C would mean brevity, and D would require discussion of public standing. The needed word names the extent or breadth of coverage. The answer is A.
